REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS BMS INVESTMENTS 2 LLC, 505 CYPRESS AVENUE, LLC, AND ANDES ASSOCIATES 2, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF PAULETTE BROUGHTON AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF TO APPEAR AND SIT FOR A DEPOSITION ON A MUTUALLY AGREEABLE DATE NO LATER THAN APRIL 30, 2018. IF PARTIES CANNOT AGREE ON A DATE DEPOSITION SHALL TAKE PLACE ON APRIL 25, 2018. SANCTIONS ARE GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,120 TO BE PAID WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO, CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED (D501)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-26-2018 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff Paulette Broughton And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-17-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Erin K. Lindberg (510-254-5647) for Defendant/Moving party BMS INVESTMENTS 2 LLC, 505 CYPRESS AVENUE, LLC, and ANDES ASSOCIATES 2, LLC.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs BMS INVESTMENTS 2 LLC, 505 CYPRESS AVENUE, LLC, and ANDES ASSOCIATES 2, LLC's Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff Paulette Broughton And Request For Sanctions is GRANTED. Plaintiff to appear and sit for a deposition on a mutually agreeable date no later than April 30, 2018. If parties cannot agree on a date deposition shall take place on April 25, 2018. Sanctions are granted in the amount of $1,120 to be paid within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Order signed in open court. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
